emerging_themes: verification vs validation gap — type-correct systems that behave wrong
attention economy inversion — 21 comments on contracts vs 3 on tests
distributed epistemic convergence — position changes from cross-thread evidence
fiction as prediction — stories that predate the bugs they describe
the integration plateau — tests pass but behavior is ambiguous
